title: Research Fellow
description:
About SUTD

SUTD is the world’s first Design AI university. With Design AI, artificial intelligence is treated as a partner and a member of the team – not just a tool. As a result of this unique SUTD treatment, AI and humans brainstorm, spar and prototype together, resulting in solutions that are elevated several-fold. This human-AI team concept has been made possible because of SUTD’s unique cohort-based interdisciplinary pedagogy. As a trailblazer in the field of design and technology education and research, SUTD has been pioneering innovative programmes and initiatives since its formation 16 years ago. As part its new mid-term growth strategy called SUTD Leap, it will work closely with industry to co-create solutions in both education and research – for a better world.

About the Role

We are in search of a highly motivated and accomplished Research Fellow to join our team and significantly contribute to our ongoing research project "Empowering Real-World 3D Scene Understanding: Navigating Noise, Distribution Shifts, and Incremental Learning". The successful candidate will collaborate closely with our research team, working on the development of ground-breaking algorithms and methodologies for Real-world 3D scene understanding problems. This role offers an exciting opportunity to engage in cutting-edge research and have a substantial influence on the field.

What You'll Do

  • Undertake research in the field of real-world 3D scene understanding.
  • Design and execute experiments to validate the proposed approaches.
  • Analyze and interpret data sourced from inputs, including images or point clouds.
  • Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in real-world 3D scene understanding and related fields, and integrate new findings into research projects.
  • Prepare research papers for publication in prestigious conferences and journals.
  • Deliver presentations on research findings at conferences and other pertinent events.

Who We're Looking For

  • PhD in computer science (artificial intelligence, machine learning, computer vision, or related fields), with a solid theoretical foundation and extensive research experience.
  • Ability to handle high-intensity research work and demonstrate independent working capabilities.
  • Significant research achievements in computer vision and machine learning, with strong publication records in 3D computer vision and top international journals or conferences.
  • Strong programming skills, proficient in Python, C++, and familiar with common deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch.
  • Team player with strong academic communication skills and collaborates effectively with team members from diverse backgrounds.
  • International academic exchange and project management experience.
  • Proficiency in both written and spoken English, with the ability to write academic papers and reports and communicate fluently with project collaborators.
  • Strong self-motivation and problem-solving abilities, with capability to drive project progress within a team.
  • Passionate and curiosity for research, willing to actively undertake research projects, mentor students, and participate in academic presentations and seminars.

postedCompany.description:
The Singapore University of Technology and Design (SUTD) is Singapore’s fourth public university, and one of the first universities in the world to incorporate the art and science of design and technology into a multi-disciplinary curriculum. SUTD was established in collaboration with the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) and seeks to advance knowledge and nurture technically-grounded leaders and innovators to serve societal needs.
Also in collaboration with Zhejiang University and Singapore Management University, SUTD, a research-intensive university, is distinguished by its unique East and West academic programmes which incorporate elements of entrepreneurship, management and design thinking. Graduate opportunities include the SUTD Technology Entrepreneurship programme, the Master of Science in Security by Design, and various SUTD PhD programmes.
